At Uzhnaq Technology Pvt Ltd, we are dedicated to precision engineering and the manufacturing of high-quality gears and engineering components. With a steadfast commitment to excellence and innovation, we strive to deliver products that meet the highest standards of performance and reliability

Our Global Presence

Our Global Presence

Have a look at how we craft
each and every Product

Design & Engineering

Our process begins with a robust design and engineering phase. Our team of skilled engineers uses advanced CAD (Computer-Aided Design) software to create detailed designs and simulations. We work closely with our clients to understand their specific requirements and ensure our designs meet or exceed their expectations

Design & Engineering

Our process begins with a robust design and engineering phase. Our team of skilled engineers uses advanced CAD (Computer-Aided Design) software to create detailed designs and simulations. We work closely with our clients to understand their specific requirements and ensure our designs meet or exceed their expectations

Material Selection

Selecting the right materials is crucial for the performance and durability of our components. We source high-quality raw materials from trusted suppliers, ensuring that each batch meets stringent quality standards. Our material selection process considers factors such as strength, hardness, and wear resistance to guarantee optimal performance

Material Selection

Selecting the right materials is crucial for the performance and durability of our components. We source high-quality raw materials from trusted suppliers, ensuring that each batch meets stringent quality standards. Our material selection process considers factors such as strength, hardness, and wear resistance to guarantee optimal performance

Material Selection

Selecting the right materials is crucial for the performance and durability of our components. We source high-quality raw materials from trusted suppliers, ensuring that each batch meets stringent quality standards. Our material selection process considers factors such as strength, hardness, and wear resistance to guarantee optimal performance

Prototyping & Testing

Before full-scale production, we develop prototypes to validate our designs. These prototypes undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet all specifications and performance criteria. This phase allows us to identify and rectify any potential issues early in the process

Prototyping & Testing

Before full-scale production, we develop prototypes to validate our designs. These prototypes undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet all specifications and performance criteria. This phase allows us to identify and rectify any potential issues early in the process

Prototyping & Testing

Before full-scale production, we develop prototypes to validate our designs. These prototypes undergo rigorous testing to ensure they meet all specifications and performance criteria. This phase allows us to identify and rectify any potential issues early in the process

Precision Machining

Using state-of-the-art CNC (Computer Numerical Control) machines, we perform precision machining to create the components. Our advanced machinery allows us to achieve tight tolerances and complex geometries with exceptional accuracy

Precision Machining

Using state-of-the-art CNC (Computer Numerical Control) machines, we perform precision machining to create the components. Our advanced machinery allows us to achieve tight tolerances and complex geometries with exceptional accuracy

Precision Machining

Using state-of-the-art CNC (Computer Numerical Control) machines, we perform precision machining to create the components. Our advanced machinery allows us to achieve tight tolerances and complex geometries with exceptional accuracy

Heat Treatment

Heat treatment is a critical step to enhance the mechanical properties of our components. We utilize advanced heat treatment techniques such as hardening, tempering, and annealing to improve the strength, hardness, and durability of the materials. This process ensures that our components can withstand demanding operational conditions

Heat Treatment

Heat treatment is a critical step to enhance the mechanical properties of our components. We utilize advanced heat treatment techniques such as hardening, tempering, and annealing to improve the strength, hardness, and durability of the materials. This process ensures that our components can withstand demanding operational conditions

Heat Treatment

Heat treatment is a critical step to enhance the mechanical properties of our components. We utilize advanced heat treatment techniques such as hardening, tempering, and annealing to improve the strength, hardness, and durability of the materials. This process ensures that our components can withstand demanding operational conditions

Surface Finishing

To achieve the desired surface quality and aesthetics, we perform various surface finishing processes. These include polishing, coating, and plating to enhance corrosion resistance and provide a smooth, clean finish. Our surface finishing techniques are tailored to meet the specific needs of each application

Surface Finishing

To achieve the desired surface quality and aesthetics, we perform various surface finishing processes. These include polishing, coating, and plating to enhance corrosion resistance and provide a smooth, clean finish. Our surface finishing techniques are tailored to meet the specific needs of each application

Quality Control & Inspection

Quality is at the core of our manufacturing process. We implement stringent quality control measures at every stage of production. Our inspection team uses advanced metrology equipment and techniques, to verify dimensional accuracy and ensure that each component meets the highest quality standards

Quality Control & Inspection

Quality is at the core of our manufacturing process. We implement stringent quality control measures at every stage of production. Our inspection team uses advanced metrology equipment and techniques, to verify dimensional accuracy and ensure that each component meets the highest quality standards

Surface Finishing

To achieve the desired surface quality and aesthetics, we perform various surface finishing processes. These include polishing, coating, and plating to enhance corrosion resistance and provide a smooth, clean finish. Our surface finishing techniques are tailored to meet the specific needs of each application

Packaging & Delivery

Once the components pass all quality checks, we carefully package them to protect against damage during transit. Our packaging solutions are designed to ensure safe and secure delivery to our clients. We work with reliable logistics partners to guarantee timely delivery of our products

Continuous Improvement

At Uzhnaq Technology Pvt Ltd, we are committed to continuous improvement. We regularly review and refine our manufacturing processes to enhance efficiency, reduce waste, and incorporate the latest technological advancements. Our goal is to stay at the forefront of the industry, delivering superior products and services to our clients

Continuous Improvement

At Uzhnaq Technology Pvt Ltd, we are committed to continuous improvement. We regularly review and refine our manufacturing processes to enhance efficiency, reduce waste, and incorporate the latest technological advancements. Our goal is to stay at the forefront of the industry, delivering superior products and services to our clients

Transforming with
Advanced Technology

Transforming with
Advanced Technology

  • MILLING

    Our milling capabilities include both Vertical Machining Centers (VMC) and Horizontal Machining Centers (HMC), allowing us to handle complex and high-precision components with efficiency and accuracy. This combination ensures flexibility in machining operations, enabling us to meet diverse customer requirements across various industries

  • TEETH GENERATION

    Our teeth generation process utilizes advanced gear hobbing and gear shaping technologies, including specialized taper gear shaping, to produce high-precision gears with exceptional accuracy. These methods ensure consistent quality and performance, making them ideal for a wide range of industrial applications.

  • TEETH SHAVING & GRINDING

    Our teeth shaving and grinding operations include precision gearshaving and advanced gear teeth grinding to achieve superior surface finish and dimensional accuracy. These processes enhance gear performance by reducing noise, improving contact patterns, and ensuring long-term reliability in demanding applications

  • TURNING / BLANKING

    Our turning and blanking operations begin with accurate facing and centering, followed by machining on a range of equipment including conventional lathes, CNC turning centers, and CNC turning linear machines. This combination allows us to deliver high-precision components with consistent quality, tailored to meet the specific requirements of various industries

  • TEETH ROUNDING / CHAMFERING

    Our teeth rounding and chamfering processes include precise tooth chamfering, rounding, and deburring to enhance gear quality and functionality. These operations improve assembly ease, reduce stress concentrations, and ensure smooth gear engagement, contributing to the overall durability and performance of the final product

  • GRINDERS

    Our grinding capabilities feature a range of advanced machines including internal grinders, cylindrical grinders, and tool/cutter grinders. These allow us to achieve high levels of precision, surface finish, and dimensional accuracy, ensuring that components meet the most stringent quality standards across various applications

  • MEASUREMENT & INSPECTION

    Our comprehensive measurement and inspection capabilities ensure the highest standards of quality and precision. We utilize advanced equipment including lead and profile testers, gear testers, and gear roll testers for detailed gear analysis. Metallurgical microscopes are used for microstructure evaluation, while surface plates and bench centres provide accurate dimensional checks. Additionally, we ensure material integrity with Rockwell and Micro Vickers hardness testers, verifying the hardness and strength of components with precision

  • MARKING MACHINES

    Our marking capabilities include a variety of advanced and reliable techniques such as laser marking, NC engraving, roll marking, and marking punch press. These methods ensure clear, durable, and precise identification of components, supporting traceability and compliance with industry standards

  • MILLING

    Our milling capabilities include both Vertical Machining Centers (VMC) and Horizontal Machining Centers (HMC), allowing us to handle complex and high-precision components with efficiency and accuracy. This combination ensures flexibility in machining operations, enabling us to meet diverse customer requirements across various industries

Testimonials

  • We’ve worked with many suppliers over the years, but Uzhnaq stands out for their consistent quality and attention to detail. Their parts just work—every time.

  • Uzhnaq’s components consistently meet the exact specs we require. Their precision and build quality have been instrumental in improving our end products.

  • Uzhnaq has been a reliable manufacturing partner, providing parts that integrate seamlessly with our systems. Their team clearly understands what high-performance manufacturing requires.
